creator: asharp@iqonline.net
text: OK - Wasn't focusing on the "static linking" v. dependency part.  Given that, perhaps the only question is - are there any drawbacks or gotchas that may arise out of everything using openssl and this being statically linked against LibreSSL?  Would this obscure the [logical] dependency if there's a vulnerability/bugfix/etc in terms of LibreSSL from a port auditing/update perspective?
